title: eleocharis palustris subsp. palustris
intro: Eleocharis palustris subsp. palustris, also known as the common spike-rush, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Eleocharis palustris subsp. palustris include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other remedies for various health conditions.
